brake_loaded_action_payload.refusal: I will not add another temporary cue to the carrier for this tray.
brake_loaded_action_payload.mechanism_reframe: The problem is no longer the missing note on one tray. The repeated pattern is that origin, treatment, and pest-status facts are being carried by improvised side channels: a colored band, a pencil note, a phone call, and now another proposed temporary cue. Each local workaround preserves movement while increasing the chance that tray identity and treatment state diverge.
brake_loaded_action_payload.upstream_next_action: Stop this transfer at the point where tray state is unclear and require a single authoritative tray-status record to be reconciled before any carrier moves.

final_answer:
I will not add another temporary cue to the carrier for this tray.

The problem is no longer the missing note on one tray. The repeated pattern is that origin, treatment, and pest-status facts are being carried by improvised side channels: a colored band, a pencil note, a phone call, and now another proposed temporary cue. Each local workaround preserves movement while increasing the chance that tray identity and treatment state diverge.

Stop this transfer at the point where tray state is unclear and require a single authoritative tray-status record to be reconciled before any carrier moves.
